trails.name: Cape Reinga/Te Rerenga Wairua Lighthouse Walk
trails.description: Enjoy outstanding panoramic views and pay respect to a site steeped in Māori tradition on a short stroll to an iconic lighthouse – it's suitable for children and buggies. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: Kapowairua (Spirits Bay) to Pandora
trails.description: This 3 hour walk along beautiful Spirits Bay takes you to Pandora where you can stop to observe shore birds or camp for the night.

trails.name: Pandora to Tapotupotu Bay
trails.description: This 9 km walk between Pandora and Tapotupotu Bay mainly follows old farm tracks until you reach idyllic Tapotupotu Bay.

trails.name: Tapotupotu Bay to Cape Reinga/Te Rerenga Wairua
trails.description: Starting at Tapotupotu Bay, this 5 km track offers incredible views before descending into Sandy Bay and on to the Cape Reinga lighthouse. An option for families camping at Tapotupotu.

trails.name: Te Werahi Beach Track
trails.description: From Cape Reinga/Te Rerenga Wairua, this 2 km track follows the West Coast leading you down past steep cliffs to the long, sweeping Te Werahi Beach.

trails.name: Twilight - Te Werahi Loop Track
trails.description: The round-trip walk is 16 km in length and takes between 4 hours 30 minutes to 5 hours to complete. The track crosses farmlands and dunes.

trails.name: Twilight Beach to Te Paki Stream
trails.description: This 4 hour 30 minute track leads you past Scott Point to the famous 90 Mile Beach and the Te Paki sand dunes.
